Precondition: cup_1 and cup_2 accessible; both end effectors grasp nothing.
Postcondition: Left end effector grasps cup_1; right end effector grasps cup_2.

Precondition: Left end effector grasps cup_1; right end effector grasps cup_2; table top available for placement.
Postcondition: cup_1 and cup_2 placed on table; both end effectors grasp nothing; box top unblocked.

Precondition: cup_1 and cup_2 not on box; both end effectors grasp nothing; box left and right sides accessible.
Postcondition: Box grasped with dual-arm symmetric grasp.
